headline: Akamai Technology’s (AKAM) Underperformance Can Be Explained By Investors Underestimating Data Center Opportunity
summary: Akamai Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:AKAM) is one of the 7 Underperforming Data Center Stocks to Buy According to Short Sellers. On June 30, research firm Oppenheimer released an update on the Akamai Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:AKAM) stock, reiterating its Outperform rating and assigning a $180 price target. The price target reflects a 59% upside from here on. […]
